nasb.text: Daniel said, “I was looking in my vision by night, and behold, the four winds of heaven were stirring up the great sea.

esv.text: Daniel declared, “I saw in my vision by night, and behold, the four winds of heaven were stirring up the great sea.

cnv.text: 但以理說：“在夜間的異象中，我看見天的四風，攪動大海。

ccb.text: 但以理说：“我在夜间的异象中看见天风四面吹来，搅动大海。
